steps.title: Identify the function type
steps.content:
The function $f(x) = 2.93x$ has the form $f(x) = mx + b$ (a linear function) with slope $m = 2.93$ and y-intercept $b = 0$.

Since the slope $m = 2.93 > 0$ is positive:
  • Linear: not exponential — the output is directly proportional to the input
  • Increasing: not decreasing — a positive slope means as $x$ increases, $f(x)$ increases
This is an increasing linear function. That matches choice D — D is correct.
